$comment: Adoption-scan allowlist — modules that are intentionally isolated or test-only and should NOT trigger the shelfware-threshold gate. Added v1.49.787 (Tier 1 T1.2 ship 2/3). Each entry must include a reason so future readers understand why the module is exempt.

entries.reason: Test fixture / dogfood corpus. The module's purpose is to host self-test inputs; external imports are not expected. 66 self-files + 132 self-importers.
v1.47 Holomorphic Dynamics Educational Pack — content cluster, not core substrate. PROJECT.md GAP-3 (PNW vs Global Scope) lists content-area work as intentional design.
0 self-files — directory stub for shared style tokens. Imports happen via build pipeline, not TS imports.
1 self-file — settings reader is consumed via dynamic require() / JSON load patterns that the static-import scanner doesn't detect.
1 self-file — gsd-init bootstrap module invoked via shell CLI (`skill-creator gsd-init`), not TS import. Future ship may consolidate into a normal module path.
7 self-files / 11 self-importers — retrospective tooling consumed via shell CLI (tools/session-retro/observe.mjs). TS API surface is internal-only by design.
6 self-files / 9 self-importers — DACP interpreter consumed via shell CLI surface, not TS imports. The src/dacp/ module reads interpreter outputs through filesystem hand-off, not direct API.

Legacy substrate. v786 retrospective flagged that upstream + upstream-intelligence are both isolated and may represent a rename-in-flight. Pending operator triage — exempt from shelfware threshold while investigation is open.
Legacy substrate. Companion to `upstream` — see that entry. Pending operator triage.

6 self-files / 0 self-importers — namespace placeholder for the substrate-reference docs (semantic-channel.md, bounded-learning.md). The actual implementation modules (coherent-functors, ricci-curvature-audit, etc.) live as siblings and ARE adoption-tracked individually.

Substrate-level reference implementation per arXiv:2604.19960 (Boland 2026, MATH-20 Phase 752). Ships the 24-triad neo-Riemannian lattice + P/L/R transforms + Sound of Puget Sound mapping (360 species × 360 musicians on the shared unit circle). The SoPS mapping is itself the substrate for an operator-filtered research-cadence surface; the module is the durable backing for that surface. Default-OFF, HARD-preservation invariants intact (G6 standard CAPCOM preservation gate), zero side-effects at import. ALLOWLISTED rather than RETIRED because the substrate is preserved, not filtered out.

Substrate-level reference implementation per arXiv:2604.16052 (Tan 2026, 75pp, MATH-19 Phase 751). Companion runtime to the canonical substrate doc docs/substrate-references/wasserstein-hebbian.md (deliberately not a faithful re-derivation; substrate-level reader's reference to the Wasserstein-2 framework for Hebbian plasticity). Ships closed-form W₂² helper + bounded-variance check + plasticity-rule validator + audit-finding emitter. Default-OFF, advisory-only (CAPCOM retains gate authority), zero side-effects at import.
